message:
fix(newproj): pass --selected flag to gum choose for pre-selected features and tech stacks

Fix the newproj TUI feature and tech stack selection screens to properly
pass previously-selected items back to gum choose via the --selected flag,
so that users returning to these screens see their prior selections preserved.

screen_features.sh / screen_tech_stack.sh:
- Build a comma-separated selected_arg string from the preselected array
- Conditionally pass --selected="$selected_arg" to gum choose only when
  there are preselected items (gum choose errors on empty --selected)
- Both screens use the same pattern: collect preselected labels, build
  the comma-joined argument, branch on whether it's non-empty

errors.sh:
- Replace echo -e with printf for portable output in get_error_pattern(),
  avoiding echo -e interpretation differences across shells

internal_checksums.sh:
- Regenerated checksums for security.sh and update.sh to reflect their
  latest content hashes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ get_error_pattern() {
     local sorted_patterns=()
     while IFS=$'\t' read -r _ pat; do
         sorted_patterns+=("$pat")
-    done < <(for p in "${!ERROR_PATTERNS[@]}"; do echo -e "${#p}\t$p"; done | sort -rn)
+    done < <(for p in "${!ERROR_PATTERNS[@]}"; do printf "%d\t%s\n" "${#p}" "$p"; done | sort -rn)
 
     for pattern in "${sorted_patterns[@]}"; do
         if [[ "$error_text" == *"$pattern"* ]]; then

@@ -121,15 +121,32 @@ handle_features_input() {
                 fi
             done
 
+            local selected_arg=""
+            if [[ ${#preselected[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+                selected_arg=$(IFS=,; echo "${preselected[*]}")
+            fi
+
             local gum_selected
-            gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
-                --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
-                --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
-                --header "Select features (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
-                "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
-                # User cancelled
-                return 1
-            }
+            if [[ -n "$selected_arg" ]]; then
+                gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
+                    --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
+                    --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
+                    --header "Select features (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
+                    --selected="$selected_arg" \
+                    "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
+                    # User cancelled
+                    return 1
+                }
+            else
+                gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
+                    --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
+                    --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
+                    --header "Select features (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
+                    "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
+                    # User cancelled
+                    return 1
+                }
+            fi
 
             # Set all to false first
             for opt in "${FEATURE_OPTIONS[@]}"; do

@@ -221,16 +221,34 @@ handle_tech_stack_input() {
                 fi
             done
 
+            local selected_arg=""
+            if [[ ${#preselected[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+                selected_arg=$(IFS=,; echo "${preselected[*]}")
+            fi
+
             local gum_selected
-            gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
-                --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
-                --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
-                --header "Select technologies (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
-                "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
-                # User cancelled
-                echo ""
-                return 1
-            }
+            if [[ -n "$selected_arg" ]]; then
+                gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
+                    --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
+                    --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
+                    --header "Select technologies (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
+                    --selected="$selected_arg" \
+                    "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
+                    # User cancelled
+                    echo ""
+                    return 1
+                }
+            else
+                gum_selected=$(gum choose --no-limit \
+                    --cursor.foreground "#cba6f7" \
+                    --selected.foreground "#a6e3a1" \
+                    --header "Select technologies (Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)" \
+                    "${options[@]}" < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null) || {
+                    # User cancelled
+                    echo ""
+                    return 1
+                }
+            fi
 
             # Map back to keys
             selected=""
